case_title: SCHIFTAN, HARRIET KAPLOWITZ VS STRADCUTTER, DORIS MRS.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-07-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-10-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.00 FILED BY SCHIFTAN, HARRIET KAPLOWITZ AS TO DEFENDANT STRADCUTTER, DORIS MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHIFTAN, HARRIET KAPLOWITZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRADCUTTER, DORIS MRS. $610.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO DORIS STRADCUTTER RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
